'''P-6''' was a treaded [[Droid/Legends|droid]] in service to the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency as a [[quarantine inspector]]. He cleaned the baggage claim area and also inspected any incoming astrocultural freights with his associate, [[S-4]]. He was able to do this by disinfecting luggage with a disinfectant spray. Both were supervised by a blue [[Quarantine supervisor R2 unit|R2 unit]].<ref name="CGST" /> P-6 at some point also performed repairs on [[StarSpeeder 3000]]s.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Carries out astrocultural inspection with S-4. Sprays insecticide on suspicious freight.|P-6's description in ''Complete Guide to Star Tours''|<ref name="CGST" />}}
The background for this droid comes from a "Spot the Droid" poster displayed at the [[Tokyo Disneyland]] [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], which was translated at the [http://www.endorexpress.net EndorExpress.net] fan site<ref name="EE">{{EndorExpress|url=2013/05/retro-tokyo-a-look-back-at-tdls-star-tours-before-it-was-updated|text=Retro-Tokyo! A look back at TDL's Star Tours before it was updated…}}</ref>, as well as the ''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]'' booklet.<ref name="CGST" /> The droid was present during the opening day of the first ride, but he and his counterpart, [[S-4]], were eventually removed. The "droids" were portrayed by re-purposed industrial robots.<ref name="EE" />
